posts.title: The Experiment
posts.alt: 3-day diary timeline: I gave Claude a full ticket. 4 hours with Claude vs 2 days my old way.

posts.title: The Receipt
posts.alt: A paper receipt listing the hours Claude saved me in one week. Total: 11.5 hours.

posts.title: The Fail
posts.alt: Code diff: 400 lines deleted, 38 lines shipped. The bug was my prompt.

posts.title: The Translator
posts.alt: A vague client message translated by Claude into three clear requirements.

posts.title: The Trend
posts.alt: Bar chart: AI fixing real GitHub bugs went from about 4 percent in 2023 to about 90 percent in 2026.

posts.title: The Map
posts.alt: Hand-drawn map of my daily loop with Claude, plus my two rules.

posts.title: The Reveal
posts.alt: Plot twist: AI made this whole series, including the bot that published this post.
